info.title: MICROSERVICE_PROD_Stocks Microservice API
info.description: The Stocks Microservice API provides comprehensive access to real-time and historical stock market data, empowering financial applications and services. It allows users to retrieve stock quotes, perform searches on company information, and track stock performance over time. Typical consumers include financial analysts, trading platforms, and investment apps, enabling them to offer valuable insights and analytics. With this API, developers can enhance user engagement and decision-making in their financial solutions.

post.summary: Create a new stock entry in the portfolio.
post.description: This endpoint allows users to add a new stock to their portfolio. It requires information about the stock, including the stock symbol, quantity, and purchase price. Successful requests will update the user's portfolio with the new stock entry.

requestBody.description: Creates a new stock entry in the portfolio. The request body must contain the necessary stock information including the stock symbol, quantity, and any other relevant details.

200.description: Request completed successfully, returning the stock data.

400.description: Invalid request parameters; please check the input data.

MICROSERVICE_PROD_createPortfolioStock-C.title: Stock Subscription Response

category.description: Category of the subscription, such as 'equities' or 'bonds'.

deliveryChannel.description: Preferred delivery channel for notifications, such as email or SMS.

frequency.description: Frequency of notifications, e.g., daily, weekly, monthly.

status.description: Current status of the subscription, such as active or inactive.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the subscription was created.

symbols.description: List of stock symbols included in the subscription.

notificationEnabled.description: Indicates whether notifications are enabled for this subscription.

message.description: Message or notes associated with the subscription.

MICROSERVICE_PROD_createPortfolioStock-C.description: This schema represents the response structure for a successful stock subscription operation.

MICROSERVICE_PROD_createPortfolioStock-C.title: Portfolio Stock Operations Request

subscriptionName.description: The name of the subscription for stock operations.

category.description: The category under which the stock operations fall, such as 'alerts', 'reports', or 'recommendations'.

symbols.description: A list of stock symbols that the user is interested in.

deliveryChannel.description: The preferred communication channel for receiving notifications, such as 'email' or 'SMS'.

frequency.description: The frequency of notifications, which can include options like 'daily', 'weekly', or 'monthly'.

language.description: The preferred language for receiving notifications.

region.description: The geographical region for which the stock operations are relevant.

priority.description: The priority level of the notifications, such as 'high', 'medium', or 'low'.

clientReference.description: A unique reference provided by the client to identify this request.

portfolioId.description: The unique identifier of the portfolio associated with these stock operations.

deviceType.description: The type of device used by the client, such as 'mobile' or 'desktop'.

notificationEnabled.description: Flag indicating whether notifications are enabled for this subscription.

MICROSERVICE_PROD_createPortfolioStock-C.description: This schema represents the request body for creating or updating stock operations within a portfolio. It includes details about the subscription, category, symbols, delivery preferences, and client references.

MICROSERVICE_PROD_createPortfolioStock-C.title: Portfolio Stocks Operations Error Response

subscriptionId.description: The unique identifier for the subscription.

subscriptionName.description: The name of the subscription associated with the portfolio.

category.description: The category of the subscription, indicating the type of alerts or updates.

deliveryChannel.description: The method by which notifications will be delivered (e.g., email, SMS).

frequency.description: The frequency of the notifications (e.g., daily, weekly).

status.description: The current status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the subscription was created.

symbols.description: A list of stock symbols subscribed to for notifications.

notificationEnabled.description: Indicates whether notifications are enabled for this subscription.

message.description: A message providing additional information about the error.

MICROSERVICE_PROD_createPortfolioStock-C.description: This schema defines the structure of the error response when a POST operation related to portfolio stocks fails. It includes details about the subscription and relevant status messages.

Vary.description: Indicates the cache mechanisms that might affect the response for this request when it fails. It helps in identifying the right cache policy for error responses.
